title: Bestiary
description: A modpack built around 'Lycanites Mobs' and 'Ice and Fire' for a monster taming-slaying experience.
body:
The pack is currently in an early dev phase! Every feedback or advice is highly appreciated!
---

A modpack built around 'Lycanites Mobs' and 'Ice and Fire' for a monster taming-slaying experience.


The packs main mods: 

-Lycanites Mobs

-Ice and Fire

-AbyssalCraft

 
---
Few more mods are added but I am trying to make it as lightweight as possible.

For servers I recommend installing MTQFix as it removes the "Player moved too quickly" check allowing smoother movement, but use it only if you trust others that they wont cheat!
